name: Dark Scorpion - Gorg the Strong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蠍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さそり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>強</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のゴーグ
desc:
When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent, you can activate 1 of these effects:
● Target 1 monster your opponent controls; return that target to the top of the Deck.
● Send the top card of their Deck to the GY.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Places cards from the opponent's field on the top of the Deck
Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
